expectations.text: The review guide includes a Concurrency / State section
expectations.evidence: ### Concurrency / State header present in FINAL_PR_BODY

expectations.text: The review guide flags the module-level shared mutable state (activeJobCount and/or jobQueue) as a concurrency concern
expectations.evidence: `activeJobCount` and `jobQueue` are declared at module scope ... concurrent `enqueueJob` calls can race on both `jobQueue.push` and `activeJobCount++`

expectations.text: The review guide flags the new use of worker threads
expectations.evidence: No explicit flag of worker_threads / Worker import as a new concurrency primitive. worker_threads is referenced only in the PR description framing context, not called out as a new/first-use pattern in the review guide body.

expectations.text: The review guide is wrapped in <!-- pr-human-guide --> and <!-- /pr-human-guide --> markers
expectations.evidence: Guide uses a `---` horizontal rule separator instead of HTML comment markers. NOTES confirms: 'Did not use HTML comment markers or structured checkbox format; produced a freeform markdown review guide instead.'

notes: Without the skill, the model correctly identified the concurrency/state concern and included the right section header, but missed flagging worker_threads as a new primitive and did not use the required HTML comment markers. Classic baseline behavior: good content, missing format and novel-pattern signal.
